rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THEODORE P. GLAZA TRUST DATED APRIL 14, 2014
rulings.Calendar Matter: Matthew A. Guerra?S Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: Parties are required to appear. Remote appearance is available in conformity with the current General Order of the Probate and Mental Health Division, available on the court's website at https://sfsuperiorcourt.org/divisions/probate. To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765 and passcode 514879. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts. Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765# and passcode 514879#. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.
